channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][剧场版][公开] Anime News Network CloverWorks Omnibus 动画 Film Grotesqqque 公开 35 Musical Contributors
item.description: -otoha-, Reol, Junna, Hashimero, more provide music for 2026 film ― Anime studio CloverWorks announced on Wednesday the 35 musical acts who are contributing to its original anime film Grotesqqque... | 来源: ANN | 原文: CloverWorks' Omnibus Anime Film Grotesqqque Reveals 35 Musical Contributors

(Just Like Mona Lisa) manga on Wednesday. The website... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Shaft Produces 'Seibetsu "Mona Lisa" no Kimi e.' TV Anime Adaptation
